name: AILA - Associazione Italiana di Logica e sue Applicazioni
nameEnglish: Italian Association for Logic and its Applications
description: The Italian national association for logic and its applications, promoting research and collaboration in logic, foundations of mathematics, and computational logic.

name: SILFS - Società Italiana di Logica e Filosofia delle Scienze
nameEnglish: Italian Society of Logic and Philosophy of Science
description: Italian society dedicated to promoting research in logic, philosophy of science, and the foundations of scientific knowledge.

name: AIxIA - Associazione Italiana per l'Intelligenza Artificiale
description: The Italian national association for artificial intelligence, promoting research, education, and industrial applications of AI technologies.

name: GULP - Gruppo Utenti Logic Programming
description: Italian user group for logic programming, fostering research and applications in logic programming, constraint programming, and related areas.
